item.title: Benefits of Reflexology for Stress Relief
item.description: Discover how reflexology may support relaxation, reduce stress, and help you reconnect with a sense of calm.

item.title: Why Cats Feel Like Night Creatures (But Aren’t Exactly Nocturnal)
item.description: Cats are often called nocturnal, but their biology tells a more interesting story about crepuscular evolution, hunting instincts, and domestication.
item.dc:creator: Your Name, LMFT

item.title: What Is Reflexology and How Does It Work?
item.description: Learn what reflexology is, how it works, and what to expect during a professional reflexology session.
